div1.entryFree:
Acre, 1) a ploughed or sowed field within certain limits: my bosky --s and my unshrubbed down, Tp. IV, 81. between the --s of the rye, As V, 3, 23. over whose --s walked those blessed feet, H4A I, 1, 25. searchevery a. in the high-grown field, Lr. IV, 4, 7.
2) a certain quantity of land (160 square rods): an a. of barren ground, Tp. I, 1, 70. ere with spur we heat an a. Wint. I, 2, 96. throw millions of --s on us, Hml. V, 1, 304.
